query:
DELETE m1 FROM metricas m1
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT vendedorId, mes, MAX(dataExtracao) as maxData
  FROM metricas
  GROUP BY vendedorId, mes
) m2 ON m1.vendedorId = m2.vendedorId 
  AND m1.mes = m2.mes 
  AND m1.dataExtracao = m2.maxData
WHERE m2.maxData IS NULL

  FROM metricas

  AND m1.mes = m2.mes
